name: bioinformatics_rnaseq_task_api
description: Draft Coze plugin metadata for the backend Bulk RNA-seq task lifecycle API.
intended_users: researchers with Bulk RNA-seq count matrix data
analysts preparing exploratory RNA-seq task runs
developers configuring a future Coze API tool
safety_notes: Use safe relative input paths only.
Do not expose local absolute paths in user-facing responses.
Do not describe exploratory minimal workflow output as formal statistical evidence.
Do not claim DESeq2 ran unless the DESeq2 run completed.
limitations: Draft preparation metadata only; not a published Coze plugin.
No real Coze publication is included.
No edgeR, limma, or enrichment analysis is included.
